name: Generic Invoice
description: Generic invoice or receipt. Detects invoice numbers, dates, EU VAT IDs, IBAN, BIC/SWIFT (context-anchored), international phones, plus names, addresses, emails. Amounts kept visible — toggle Amounts manually to hide totals too.

patterns.name: Invoice number
patterns.description: Invoice number with common prefixes (INV, INVOICE, N°, #, etc.) — supports embedded dashes

patterns.name: EU VAT Number
patterns.description: EU VAT number — 2-letter uppercase country code (optional space) + 8 to 12 digits

patterns.name: IBAN
patterns.description: International Bank Account Number — supports spaces between groups

patterns.name: BIC / SWIFT
patterns.description: BIC/SWIFT code — anchored to BIC: or SWIFT: label to avoid matching ordinary uppercase words

patterns.name: Date (any common format)
patterns.description: Dates in DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY, DD-MM-YY etc.

patterns.name: International phone number
patterns.description: International phone — bounded to avoid matching inside longer numbers (IBANs, account numbers)

patterns.name: Order / PO number
patterns.description: Purchase order or order number — supports embedded dashes
